creator: michael.grunewald@laposte.net
text:
Hello,

I was about to propose a solution, but it seems the problem is goneâ¦

The META file distributed along with labltgtk2 has the right declaration
directory="+lablgtk2".

We probably may close this PR.


=====
while the solution with the symlink would work, it is nicer to write
the META file adequately(*): a declaration like

  directory="+lablgtk2"

would do.  See for instance lib/ocaml/site-lib/labltk/META for a real
example.
=====

Regards,
Michael
